title: Dinnerbone Expansion
description: Dinnerbone? How about Lunchbone & Breakfastbone? A mod that makes entity flip 90 degrees.
body:
**--Added two more custom name-related easter egg.**  

--"Breakfastbone" Renamed entity will flip 90 degrees with Y-axis rotation.  

--"Lunchbone" Renamed entity will flip 90 degrees with Z-axis rotation.  

![Renamed Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80249c31b7c321659d747377441f607daa66772c.png)
